pi_items.source: Verified via code analysis of setup_task.sh where PROJECT_DIR is explicitly defined and created.
Verified via code analysis of setup_task.sh, which injects the bugs directly into these specific functions.
Counted the test functions generated by setup_task.sh using pytest test collection. There are exactly 8 tests across test_utils.py (3), test_filters.py (2), and test_loudness.py (3).

privileged_info_summary: The task project directory is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/audio_core. The bugs are injected in audio_processor/utils.py:get_audio_duration, audio_processor/filters.py:apply_low_cut_filter, and audio_processor/loudness.py:calculate_rms_amplitude. The test suite contains 8 tests, contradicting the metadata claim of 12.
